## XPlugin.bus property

Exposed [XBus](./x-components.xbus.md)<!-- -->, so any kind of application can subscribe to [XEventsTypes](./x-components.xeventstypes.md) without having to pass through a component. This property is only available after installing the plugin.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
static get bus(): XBus;
```
